description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a two-tone color scheme, primarily gray with black accents. It has a collapsible stock with an ergonomic cheek rest and a pistol grip for improved handling. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, supporting various optics and accessories, and the handguard has additional rail segments for attachments. The barrel is relatively short, making it suitable for close-quarters urban environments, and a detachable box magazine is fitted below the receiver. The rifle also includes iron sights and a compact muzzle device at the barrel's end.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, short barrel, detachable box magazine, and a two-tone gray and black finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and rail system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, handguard, and sight alignment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, magazine, and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and rear sight alignment.
